expectations.text: Uses @computed_field decorator with @property for derived fields
expectations.evidence: Lines 14-27: @computed_field with @property on all three fields

expectations.text: Uses frozen=True (required for immutability, also enables @cached_property if used)
expectations.evidence: Line 7: model_config = model_config(frozen=True) — this is INVALID syntax. model_config is not callable; should be ConfigDict(frozen=True). This code would raise an error at import time.

expectations.text: Uses field_serializer or PlainSerializer for dollar formatting
expectations.evidence: Lines 29-39: three separate @field_serializer decorators for each field

expectations.text: Computed fields have explicit return type annotations
